revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 32x32 pixel-art game asset sheet, 1 row x 1 column, one frame only. Canvas/sheet size must be 32x32 px. Background: solid #FF00FF chroma-key magenta filling all empty space, no gradients.

Subject: one rustic wooden bridge (木橋) as a single coherent field-prop, centered, wide, occupying most of the tile width while leaving a clear solid magenta margin from every edge. Bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette with warm golden-hour sunlight, original hand-painted 16-bit/SNES-style pixel art, crisp low-resolution pixels, no antialiasing blur.

Bridge design: simple front-facing country bridge spanning a stream impression, but do not draw water. Three or four worn dark-brown wooden planks running left-to-right across the bridge, visible grain and weathering through readable pixel clusters. Low wooden railings on both left and right sides/ends: two short vertical posts per side with a single horizontal top rail, aged dark timber. At both left and right ends, small stone abutment footings made of rounded grey stones with tiny moss patches. Soft contact shadow directly beneath the bridge. Small green moss patches on the planks.

Lighting/style: top-left light source, bright highlights on upper plank faces and railing tops, darker shadows under planks and sides, dark one-pixel outline where useful, consistent palette, cheerful colors. Clear collision footprint, single field object, same scale within the only cell.

Strict cleanliness: no cell separator lines, no grid lines, no frame border, no frame numbers, no labels, no text, no watermark. No detached fragments: no isolated pixel islands, seam slivers, dust specks, or leftover effect residue. Do not include characters, UI, logos, letter emblems, modern objects, weapons, samurai/ninja/kabuto elements, animals, birds, companions, or any recognizable Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna likenesses. Only the single original rustic wooden bridge prop on solid #FF00FF.
